name: AI MediaPipe Pose Bridge
notes: Place the compiled DLL alongside this file.
SIM backend: models/ directory is optional (no real model needed).
REAL backend: set backend to REAL and place at least pose_landmarker_full.task in models/.
Run bridge/mediapipe_pose/tools/fetch_model.ps1 (Windows) or fetch_model.sh (Linux) to download models.
